# NexSphere

> Hybrid social network blending live conversation, professional networking, and communities in one intent-ranked feed.

NexSphere combines the speed of live conversation with professional networking and community spaces. Users share updates, apply for jobs, join communities, and RSVP to events from one intent-aware feed.

## Pages

- [Feed](/): Intent-ranked home feed of updates, articles, and projects.
- [Explore](/explore): Trending topics and discovery across the platform.
- [Jobs](/jobs): Job listings you can save and apply to.
- [Communities](/communities): Public and private groups to join.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming online and in-person events.
- [Profile](/profile): Public professional profile view.
